response:
the force with which the airstream acts on a sail can be calculated using the formula:  
f = (b s rho (v0 - v)^2) / 2  
where b is the aerodynamic force coefficient, s is the sail area (s = 7 m²), rho is the air density, v0 is the wind speed (v0 = 6.3 m/s), and v is the speed of the sailboat.  

at a certain moment, the instantaneous wind power reaches its maximum value. what is the speed of the sailboat at this moment?  

the maximum wind power occurs when the derivative of the force with respect to velocity is zero.  
this means the sailboat is moving at a speed that balances the aerodynamic forces.  

the maximum wind power occurs when the velocity of the sailboat is equal to the wind speed.  

the speed of the sailboat at this moment is 6.3 m/s.  

the pen is mightier than sword

the pen is mightier than sword
